span.p: Section 355: Assault or criminal force with intent to dishonour otherwise tha...

span.p: Whoever uses criminal force to any person

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Intending thereby to dishonour that person

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Otherwise than on grave and sudden provocation given by that person
